purpose: policy for expanding PDG build scope from seed-only files to a minimal related-file set
principles: single bridge-completion expansion at most once
separate cache update scope from local DFG scope
attach selection reasons to every chosen path

tiers.name: seed_or_changed_core
tiers.rule: always include changed files in diff mode and seed-symbol files in explicit-seed mode
tiers.local_dfg: include only when extension is .rs or .rb

tiers.name: direction_aware_direct_boundary
tiers.rule: select files of symbols one hop away on the base ref graph; callers uses incoming edges, callees uses outgoing edges, both uses the union
tiers.local_dfg: include only when extension is .rs or .rb

tiers.name: bridge_completion
tiers.rule: allow one extra file only when needed to close wrapper-return or boundary-side alias/summary propagation across the current one-hop boundary
tiers.local_dfg: include only when extension is .rs or .rb
tiers.budget: at most one bridge-completion file per seed

tiers.name: module_companion_fallback
tiers.rule: use path/module heuristics only as a fallback for already-selected graph boundary files (for example Rust foo.rs <-> foo/mod.rs or Ruby require_relative companions)
tiers.local_dfg: include only when extension is .rs or .rb and budget allows

ordering.stop_rule: do not recurse beyond tier 2 boundary expansion

scope_split.cache_update_scope: tier0 + tier1 + tier2 + necessary tier3, bounded by cache_update_paths_max
scope_split.local_dfg_scope: rust/ruby subset of selected files, bounded by local_dfg_paths_max
scope_split.invariant: cache_update_scope is a superset of local_dfg_scope

diff_mode.tier1: files of direct boundary symbols adjacent to changed symbols

seed_mode.tier1: files of direct callers/callees of the seed symbols according to direction

per_seed_mode.rule: plan per-seed first so scope reasons remain attributable even if execution later unions the resulting path sets

initial_test_surface: planner unit tests for selected paths/reasons
